headlines: Morgan Stanley files final amendment for MSBT spot Bitcoin ETF
Drift Protocol suffers ~$285M exploit on Solana
Blockchain analytics flags North Korea links in Drift exploit
Circle unveils cirBTC — a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin product
Linux Foundation launches x402 Foundation to standardize web payments (Coinbase’s x402)​

articles.title: Morgan Stanley files final amendment for MSBT spot Bitcoin ETF
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed Amendment No. 4 to its S‑1 for the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust (proposed ticker MSBT), naming custodians and outlining a low 0.14% fee — a late-stage step that suggests the spot‑BTC ETF could list soon on NYSE Arca if regulators sign off.

articles.title: Drift Protocol suffers ~$285M exploit on Solana
articles.summary: Drift, a major Solana-based perpetuals platform, was hit by a large vault drain on April 1–2 that security trackers estimate at roughly $200–$285 million. The protocol paused deposits and withdrawals as teams raced to contain the attack and trace funds.

articles.title: Blockchain analytics flags North Korea links in Drift exploit
articles.summary: Multiple blockchain analytics firms and news outlets reported indicators tying the Drift attacker to North Korea–linked hacking groups; attribution is unconfirmed but would raise sanctions and compliance risks for bridges and exchanges that processed the stolen funds.

articles.title: Circle unveils cirBTC — a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin product
articles.summary: Circle announced cirBTC, a wrapped‑Bitcoin token backed 1:1 by native BTC with on‑chain reserve verification. Circle positions cirBTC as an institutional, neutral alternative to existing wrapped BTC products and says it will launch on Arc and Ethereum first.

articles.title: Linux Foundation launches x402 Foundation to standardize web payments (Coinbase’s x402)
articles.summary: The Linux Foundation launched the x402 Foundation to steward the x402 HTTP payment standard (contributed by Coinbase). Major technology and payments firms joined as supporters to build an open, internet‑native payments layer for AI agents, micro‑payments, and on‑web commerce.

articles.title: U.S. jobs report (Mar) lifts Bitcoin, cushions crypto markets
articles.summary: The U.S. March nonfarm payrolls report surprised to the upside on Apr 3; crypto markets reacted modestly with Bitcoin and several blue‑chip tokens ticking higher as traders digested macro data while traditional markets observed the Good Friday holiday.

articles.title: Solana prices fall as Drift hack shakes ecosystem confidence
articles.summary: Solana’s token (SOL) dropped after the Drift exploit, as investors sold high‑beta assets exposed to on‑chain DeFi risk; the incident renewed scrutiny of Solana‑native DeFi security and cross‑chain bridges.

articles.title: On‑chain investigators criticize Circle over USDC flows during Drift attack
articles.summary: Prominent on‑chain researchers publicly criticized Circle for allowing stolen USDC to move through its Cross‑Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) during the Drift exploit; the debate reopened questions about freeze policies, issuer response times, and centralized controls on widely used stablecoins.
